name: djfhe HTTP Client
author: djfhe
source: X4 extension: non-blocking http/https client (luasocket + luasec) with a callback interface

components.title: HTTP Request (Lua)
components.summary: Non-blocking HTTP client. require('djfhe.http.request') then build with the FLUENT API: Request.new(METHOD):setUrl(url):setBody(table):send(callback). Callback is (response, err); response:getBody() / response:getJson() read the result. Polled every 50ms; Protected UI must be disabled (loads native dlls).

symbols.name: djfhe.http.request
symbols.summary: The request module. require it: local Request = require('djfhe.http.request').

symbols.name: Request.new
symbols.summary: Construct a request. Signature: Request.new(method, headers?, url?, parameters?, body?). Use DOT call with a METHOD STRING (Request.new('POST')) — NOT colon-with-a-table (Request:new({...}) is wrong).
symbols.scaffold:
local Request = require("djfhe.http.request")
local json = require("jsonlua.json")
Request.new("POST"):setUrl("http://127.0.0.1:8713/v1/request"):setBody({ key = "value" }):send(function(response, err)
  if err then return end
  local data = response:getJson()
end)

symbols.name: :setUrl
symbols.summary: Set the target URL. Returns self (chainable).

symbols.name: :setBody
symbols.summary: Set the request body; a table is JSON-encoded automatically. Returns self.

symbols.name: :send
symbols.summary: Fire the request asynchronously. send(function(response, err) ... end). On success response:getBody()/getJson(); on failure err is a string.

components.title: Client update loop
components.summary: Internal: the MD-driven 50ms poll that advances open requests. Consumers don't call this.

symbols.name: 'djfhe.http.client.update'
symbols.summary: Internal poll event raised by djfhe's own MD script every 50ms. Not for consumer use.
